prose:
**Furan frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`, exact integrals, no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single‐point on the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz` coordinates (no optimization). SCF converged cleanly in 9 cycles. No warnings reported.
HOMO = −6.3597638 eV
LUMO = −0.1024036 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV

Command:
```
cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz   --method dft --tier standard --stdout path --out furan_dft_standard.json
```
